name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the chocolate wafers with a rolling pin until finely crumbled.
2. Place the crumbs in a small bowl, add sugar and shortening.
3. Blend together until no trace of shortening remains. Press firmly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 7 minutes.
5. Cool on a wire rack. In a double boiler, melt marshmallows with milk. Set aside to cool.
6. In a small bowl, whip heavy cream until stiff.
7. When the marshmallow mixture is cool, add creme de cacao and creme de menthe. Stir well and fold into the whipped cream, scraping sides of the bowl with a spatula.
8. Pour into the cooled crust. Place in freezer.
9. When frozen, cover with plastic wrap. Keep well frozen until ready to eat. May garnish with grated semi-sweet chocolate, whipped cream or cherries.
Yields one 9-inch pie
